'''Mongei Shai''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] and the grandfather of [[Shedao Shai]].

==Biography==
===Life===
Around the year [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], Shai was a member of an expedition to [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]] which left their [[Koros-Strohna]] to establish the Yuuzhan Vong's first base in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Mongei stayed on Bimmiel providing contact with the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|worldship convoy]] until he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[slashrat]]s. His death was a great honor to [[Domain Shai]].

===Legacy===
Many years later, an expedition sent by the [[University of Agamar|University]] of [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] [[AR-312|found]] Mongei's body on Bimmiel. Mongei's descendants [[Neira Shai]] and [[Dranae Shai]] were sent to retrieve the body, but were killed by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]. Due to the disrespect of Mongei's body, his grandson [[Shedao Shai|Shedao]] [[Battle of Ithor|fought]] for it with Corran Horn on [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. However, Shedao was killed by Horn.
